rationale: Both correctly flag the same core api-design flaws grounded in the diff (vacuous IsUnipotent under geomReduced, incomplete AlgPoints stub, True placeholder fields/lemmas in the classes) and would drive removal or isolation of exactly those elements; Review 1's extra nits (naming, missing simp, rebinding, premature intro/elim lemmas) are either stylistic/contested or would be moot after the shared fixes, producing equivalent resulting PRs.
